# 测试驱动开发(TDD)

测试驱动开发(TDD) is a core concept in software engineering. Closely related to [[devops]], [[code-review]], [[accelerate-devops]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
